title: New ClawHub skill: web-research - Route internet search, research, and lookup tasks through a
content:
Route internet search, research, and lookup tasks through a unified CLI — DuckDuckGo, Wikipedia, and URL fetch in one tool. Zero external dependencies beyond Python stdlib.

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/web-research

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
